column1: # values=as-printed | companion=stb0301.xls (EIA AER 2011 full annual series; PDF=selected-years subset)

# model=Year + {Coal,NaturalGas,CrudeOil,FossilFuelComposite}x{Nominal,Real} + PercentChange (10 cols). Two-tier header (rule 4): group label in leftmost spanned col, sub-col empty; Year & Percent Change span both header rows -> text in TOP row, leaf row empty. R-prefix is Revised; 2011P is Preliminary; (s) is magnitude under 0.05 percent; en-dash pair (1949 Percent Change) is Not applicable, render-only/companion-confirmed.
